highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.150.0 adds fast-bounds culling, three new image/color filters, and lands on Skia m150.
highlights_body: SKPaint.GetFastBounds() gives cheap quick-reject bounds, SKImageFilter picks up Crop and Empty, and SKColorFilter gains an overdraw visualizer. A small-sigma raster blur regression is fixed and SKSurface.Canvas is now cached across calls to cut per-frame allocations.

breaking.title: Remaining pre-v4 obsolete enum members removed
breaking.body: Enum members and types that were `[Obsolete]` before v4 are removed from the reference assembly. If you get a `CS0117` or `CS0619` on an enum value that was previously deprecated, use the replacement documented on the type.

breaking.title: .NET Interactive (Polyglot Notebooks) support removed
breaking.body: The `SkiaSharp.Extensions.DotNetInteractive` integration is removed; the underlying .NET Interactive extensibility surface it depended on is no longer maintained. Consumers rendering SkiaSharp images in notebooks should encode to a byte[] and use a generic image display cell instead.

bullets.detail: The bundled engine moves to m150 and folds in a follow-up upstream chrome/m150 bug-fix sync.
A cheap conservative bounds computation for a paint (stroke + effects) — use it to skip draws that fall outside the clip without building a full bounds pipeline.
`SKImageFilter.CreateCrop`, `SKImageFilter.CreateEmpty` and `SKColorFilter.CreateOverdraw` fill in commonly-needed filters (bounds cropping, no-op filter, overdraw visualization).
Defining `SK_AVOID_SLOW_RASTER_PIPELINE_BLURS` restores the fast blur path for very small sigmas that had regressed to the slow pipeline (visible as blurry-but-noisy output on tight shadows).
The `Canvas` property no longer allocates a new wrapper on every access — the same managed wrapper is returned for a given surface, cutting per-frame allocations in draw loops.
Picks up the upstream 14.2.1 bug-fix release.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: The trim of remaining pre-v4 obsoletes from the reference assembly, the SKSurface Canvas caching, and the small-sigma raster blur regression fix

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 cut the line on the Skia m150 bump.
preview_summaries.p2: Preview 2 removed .NET Interactive support, trimmed the last pre-v4 obsoletes from the reference assembly, and picked up harfbuzz 14.2.1.
preview_summaries.rc1: The release candidate added `SKPaint.GetFastBounds()`, the new SKImageFilter/SKColorFilter factories, the SKSurface Canvas cache, the small-sigma raster blur fix, and folded in an upstream chrome/m150 bug-fix sync.
